Apostolic Ministerial Forum

The Bridge

An Apostolic Ministerial Forum under HAYAH Apostolic Ministerial Network — connecting, equipping, and deploying ministers of the Gospel across nations.

"And He Himself gave some to be apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some
pastors and teachers, for the equipping of the saints…"

Ephesians 4:11–12  ·  "That they all may be one…" John 17:21
Our Foundation

Vision & Mission

THE BRIDGE exists to connect, equip, empower, and deploy ministers of the Gospel across nations — bridging generations, graces, callings, territories, and assignments for the advancement of the Kingdom of God.

THE BRIDGE is not a platform for competition but a conduit for connection. Not a denomination, but a Divine alignment.

Apply for Membership →
Mission
To provide a unified apostolic platform that strengthens ministers through leadership training, spiritual empowerment, global ministerial exposure, and coordinated missions, while fostering sustained unity within the Body of Christ.
Open to
Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists, Pastors, Teachers, and Ministry Leaders. Membership based on calling, character, and commitment — not titles alone.
Serving from
Ottawa, Canada · Makurdi, Nigeria — reaching Africa, Europe, the Americas, and Asia.
Contact
156 Visor Private, Ottawa, Ontario
info.hayahministries@gmail.com · +1 (613) 790-2794
Core Objectives

Seven Pillars of The Bridge

Structured goals that define how we connect, train, and deploy ministers for Kingdom advancement.

01
Apostolic Unity & Kingdom Alignment

Building a non-denominational apostolic bridge that fosters oneness of purpose — breaking isolation among ministers and promoting doctrinal soundness, spiritual accountability, and mutual honor within the Body of Christ.

02
International Ministerial Opportunities

Creating global ministerial platforms through international conferences, cross-border pulpit exchanges, and global prayer gatherings — positioning ministers for international missions across Africa, Europe, the Americas, and Asia.

03
Apostolic Leadership Training

Raising governed apostolic leaders who understand Kingdom authority and order through Apostolic Schools, leadership intensives, and mentorship systems — sharpening ministers in vision execution, church systems, and Kingdom administration.

04
Evangelical Leadership Training

Equipping ministers with effective evangelism strategies — training in power evangelism, marketplace evangelism, and discipleship systems. Raising leaders who can mobilize souls, not just services.

05
Missions & Strategic Outreaches

Coordinating joint missions and outreaches locally and internationally — mobilizing ministers for rural and urban missions, IDP, prison, hospital, and community outreaches, and church planting support.

06
Sustained Unison of the Body of Christ

Functioning as a relational bridge — hosting ministerial roundtables, strategic Kingdom dialogues, and inter-ministerial prayer altars. Modelling unity as a living testimony to the world.

07
Spiritual Empowerment & Prophetic Impartation

Providing consistent platforms for apostolic and prophetic impartation, spiritual refreshing and renewal, and prayer and fasting encounters — strengthening ministers spiritually to withstand pressure, persecution, and fatigue.

Events & Programs

Key Programs & Platforms

Recurring gatherings and structured opportunities for ministerial growth, connection, and deployment.

✦
THE BRIDGE Apostolic Summit

Annual gathering for apostolic alignment, impartation, and Kingdom strategy across nations.

♦
Quarterly Leadership & Empowerment Forums

Focused leadership development sessions held four times yearly — online and in-person.

◈
Global Prayer & Impartation Nights

Recurring intercessory gatherings for ministers — prophetic impartation and corporate prayer.

❋
International Missions & Outreach Projects

Coordinated, cross-border mission deployments for members across cities and nations.

✧
Ministerial Mentorship & Alignment Circles

Intimate fathering and mentorship circles for ministers in different seasons of calling.

⊕
Apostolic Schools

Structured training modules on apostolic doctrine, Kingdom order, and territorial stewardship.

Structure & Values

How The Bridge Operates

Core Values

Christ-Centeredness Every activity, training, and platform is anchored in the Lordship of Jesus Christ.
Apostolic Order Operating within proper spiritual authority, accountability, and Kingdom governance.
Unity in Diversity Honouring diverse gifts, backgrounds, and callings while pursuing oneness of purpose.
Integrity & Accountability Walking in transparency, honoring commitments, and submitting to spiritual covering.
Spiritual Depth & Power Prioritizing genuine encounter, prophetic impartation, and Holy Spirit empowerment.
Global Kingdom Impact Positioning every minister for influence beyond their immediate territory.

Operational Structure

THE BRIDGE operates under Apostolic Oversight from HAYAH Apostolic Ministerial Network, led by an Executive Director/Convener with Regional & International Coordinators and an Advisory Council of seasoned ministers.

Core Departments

Apostolic & Leadership Training
Evangelism & Missions
International Relations & Partnerships
Prayer, Prophetic & Spiritual Life
Ministerial Welfare & Support
Media, Communications & Publications
The Closing Declaration

Not an event, but a movement of ministers
united for global Kingdom influence.

THE BRIDGE is not a platform for competition but a conduit for connection. Not a denomination, but a Divine alignment. — Apostle Dr. Royal James K. Dennis

Apply for Membership →

Membership Application

Join a covenant community of ministers committed to apostolic order, Kingdom fruitfulness, and global impact. Membership grants access to training programs, ministerial platforms, and a network of aligned leaders.

Access to Apostolic Schools & Leadership Forums
International ministerial exposure & platforms
Mentorship & alignment circles
Coordinated missions & outreach deployment
Apostolic covering & spiritual accountability
Global prayer & impartation gatherings
Proceed to Application →

Stripe payment will be required before accessing the application form.

Application

The Bridge Apostolic Ministerial Forum

Please complete all required fields accurately and honestly. Your responses are kept confidential. Fields marked * are required.

Section 1 — Personal Information
Please complete all required fields accurately.
Section 2 — Ministry Information
Tell us about your ministry context.
Section 3 — Calling & Assignment
These questions help us understand your calling and current season.
Section 4 — Training Alignment
Help us discern your expectations and goals.
Section 5 — Character & Readiness
Honesty is essential. Your responses are kept confidential.
Section 6 — Background & Ethics
These questions help protect spiritual integrity.
Section 7 — Practical Availability
Section 8 — Prayer & Support
Section 9 — Declaration & Consent
Please read carefully before submitting.
"I affirm that the information provided is truthful. I understand that 'The Bridge Apostolic Ministerial Forum' is a spiritual equipping and accountability environment, and I commit to honoring leadership, pursuing growth, and walking in humility."

By submitting you agree to the Declaration of Commitment above. All data is securely handled.

Application Received

Thank you for applying to The Bridge Apostolic Ministerial Forum. Your application has been submitted. The leadership team will review it and be in touch shortly.

Shalom — Apostle Dr. Royal James K. Dennis
